title: Iskra Pure
description: Vanilla+ polish with new animations, UI, and sound. Server-friendly, no PvP advantage.
body:
# 🌌 **Iskra Pure**

**Iskra Pure** is a **vanilla+** modpack focused on providing a **satisfying, ambient, and immersive Minecraft experience** with optimized performance, enhanced visuals, and smooth gameplay. It's perfect for players who love the core Minecraft experience but want subtle improvements without compromising server compatibility.

---

## 🔹 **Beta Phase**

**Feedback is important!**
This modpack is in **beta**. Your feedback helps improve updates, fix bugs, and add content. Share your thoughts on Discord!

---

## ⚙️ **Setup & Configuration**

### 🧠 **Allocate RAM**

Set **at least 6 GB (6000 MB)** of RAM for optimal performance.

### 🖥️ **Video Settings**

| Setting                 | Recommended Option          |
| ----------------------- | --------------------------- |
| **Render Distance**     | 16 Render Distance          |
| **Simulation Distance** | 14 Simulation Distance      |
| **Full-Screen Mode**    | Borderless for easy tabbing |

---

### 🔧 **Shader Setup**

1. **Video Settings** → **Shader Packs**
2. Select **Complementary** shader.
3. Click **Shader Settings** → **Import Settings** → Choose **Performance** or **Realism** preset.
4. **Click Apply → Done**
5. Switch back to **Borderless mode**.

---

### 🎮 **Customize Controls**

* **360° Movement**: Press **Z** to look around freely.
* **Switch Shoulder**: Press **Alt** to toggle shoulder views.
* **Body View**: Press **F6** to toggle between vanilla first person and body view.
* **Moving Eyes**: Moving eyes are visible in third person. If others have them, you’ll see them too. [Guide](https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki).

> **Tip**: Press **M** to open the **World Map**.

---

### 🌍 **Capes Management**

1. **Settings** → **Skin Customization**
2. Click the **‘BetterCapes’ button** in the **left corner** to manage capes.

---

## 🏆 **Some of the Included Features**

### **🔨 Performance & Optimization**

* **Sodium** & **Lithium**: Game performance optimizations.
* **FerriteCore**: Reduces memory usage.
* **ModernFix**: Fixes performance crashes.

---

### **🌿 Ambience & Visuals**

* **AmbientSounds**: Adds ambient background sounds.
* **Presence Footsteps**: Realistic footsteps sounds.
* **Sound Physics**: Dynamic sound behavior.
* **Immersive Thunder**: Realistic thunder sounds.

---

### **🖼️ Visual Enhancements**

* **FreshAnimations**: Smoother animations for all mobs.
* **Serious Player Animations**: Enhanced player movement & animations.
* **Smooth Particles**: Visual effects when placing blocks.

---

## 🎨 **Resource Packs for Enhanced Immersion**

Iskra Pure also supports **resource packs** like **Xali’s Enchanted Books**, which adds new textures to enhance immersion and visual appeal.


![ xali's Enchanted Books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5489ca2161d5a607487db7ca88cfb9be5d71c01f.png)
---

### **🔑 Multiplayer Support**

Iskra Pure is **fully server compatible**. The **Essential mod** allows easy co-op play. Play on **any server** with **lightweight mods** that ensure smooth gameplay.

---

## 📋 **Feedback & Future Plans**

Iskra Pure is in **beta**. Your feedback helps improve it! Before higher versions or Forge support, **Iskra Frontier** will be released. It’s a **vanilla+ overhaul** focusing on **single-player** and **co-op**, not compatible with public servers. More details will come later.

## 💬 **Join the Community**

For **updates**, **feedback**, or to **chat**, [Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/NgkmVHQs6u).

---

## **Summary**

**Iskra Pure** enhances Minecraft’s visuals, animations, and performance while maintaining the essence of its core gameplay. Ideal for those looking for a satisfying and immersive experience, it delivers smooth gameplay whether you’re playing solo or with friends, without introducing new content. With **public server support** and **user friendly mods**, Iskra Pure guarantees a seamless, enjoyable adventure. Enjoy the journey!
